tasks.title: Scaffold backend auth module structure and env config
Implement Next.js middleware for route protection
Scaffold login and register pages with form components
Review F1 implementation against acceptance criteria

activity_log.event: T01 done — backend auth skeleton created, schema and types published, scope validated.
T02 done — JWT verification, current user dependency, role guard, /me endpoint, and auth tests implemented; runtime test execution deferred to CI.
T03 done — frontend auth library and typed auth API wrapper implemented; TypeScript runtime verification deferred to CI.
T04 done — Next.js middleware implemented for route protection and admin role gating; TypeScript verification deferred to CI.
T05 done — auth UI components and pages implemented with loading/error states and strict boundary compliance.
T06 done — Codex review completed; code and boundary checks passed; runtime/toolchain checks deferred to CI.
T07 done — F1 accepted; code and boundary checks passed; runtime verification deferred to CI.
